item.title: 粉紅也吐槽！兩岸集體嘲諷館長赴中之旅｜藍白提這法案賣台！自我矮化主權，要定義兩岸還在內戰狀態｜暗示將開戰？美國AIT提醒準備避難包｜粉紅特報131期
item.itunes:title: 粉紅也吐槽！兩岸集體嘲諷館長赴中之旅｜藍白提這法案賣台！自我矮化主權，要定義兩岸還在內戰狀態｜暗示將開戰？美國AIT提醒準備避難包｜粉紅特報131期
item.itunes:author: 波特王好帥
item.itunes:summary:
值得閱讀的理由

  • 了解香港政府如何因一款手遊而動用國安法，並看見中國共產黨對言論和結社的恐懼程度。
  • 追蹤並分析一位知名反共人士轉變立場至親共的原因與影響，以及作者對此現象的批判與建議。
  • 認識台灣立法院內，部分立法委員推動可能損害台灣主權與民主制度的修法案（如定義兩岸關係為內戰、不在籍投票合法化），以及這些修法案對台灣國際地位與國家安全的潛在威脅。

摘要

影片一開始，作者分享了一款名為「逆統戰：鋼鐵火炬」的手機遊戲，如何意外地引發了中國共產黨的敏感神經。這款遊戲提供不同的陣營選擇，包括台灣和香港，甚至包含紅軍。然而，香港特區政府的國安單位突然發出警告，聲稱這款遊戲宣揚台獨港獨，並指明任何展示、下載、遊玩甚至在遊戲內消費的行為，都可能違反香港國安法。

手遊引發的國安恐慌

作者提到，由於他過去曾玩過這款遊戲、組成反共聯盟並在遊戲內消費，按照港府的說法，他已經成為了「罪犯」，不禁感嘆如今「得罪中國」的門檻越來越低。他認為這款遊戲內容其實相當單純，主要是完成任務、看故事、抽卡升級，玩家甚至可以選擇紅軍陣營，不解這如何構成「顛覆國家政權」。遊戲初推出時曾遭受中共網軍的DDoS攻擊，人氣一度下滑，然而港府的公開點名反而意外提升了遊戲的知名度，使其一度衝上香港App Store下載榜首，最終才被下架，需要在香港境外或使用VPN才能遊玩。作者認為，這起事件顯示出中共對於人民串聯集結的極度恐懼。

前反共鬥士的立場轉變

接著，作者轉向討論近期在網路內外引發廣泛關注的「館長」在中國進行直播的事件。作者表示，這位過去曾是台灣重要的反共前線鬥士，其大膽、敢言、硬漢的形象，曾經啟發了許多人投入反共行列、保衛台灣。然而，如今「館長」卻開始為中共進行統戰宣傳，活成了自己過去最討厭的樣子，這讓作者身為台灣人，感到非常心痛與悲哀。

對「館長」現象的分析與建議

作者認為，雖然「館長」投共的行為令人羞愧，但在這個時間點上，過度關注他並無益處，因為他現在所做的一切，很可能是在為台灣目前正熱烈進行的罷免不適任立委等運動進行轉移注意力。作者認為「館長」已經「一條龍服務到底」，成為了統戰傀儡，再多的謾罵也已無意義。他反而建議大家應該「鼓勵」他申請中國的居民身份證。

作者呼籲所有牆內的網友、國台辦等相關單位，盡快核發中國居民身份證給「館長」，並公開宣布。這樣一來，台灣方面就能順理成章地註銷他的台灣身份證，從而結束他這種左右搖擺、兩邊吃流量的狀態。作者認為，這樣做對中共來說效益更大，可以作為對內宣傳（台灣人回歸祖國）和對外批評（民進黨打壓）的案例。甚至連台灣的親共派和反共派對此都不會有意見，可謂「完全支持」的絕妙主意。作者總結，在「館長」取得中國身份證之前，無需再給予他過多關注。

立法院的潛在國安危機

作者強調，在「館長」扮演小丑、分散大家注意力時，真正需要高度關注的是台灣立法院內正在發生的重要議題。國民黨和民眾黨的部分立委，正在推動一系列修法，企圖將兩岸關係重新定義為內戰。作者直言這些立委是「賣台政客」，他們的目標是為中共武力犯台製造合法的藉口，為中共提供「內部策應」。

內戰定義與國際空間

作者指出，將兩岸關係定義為內戰，與中國的《反分裂國家法》第三條相互呼應，其用詞也與中共的統戰宣傳雷同。當前國際社會（包括美國及許多民主國家）已普遍認可聯合國2758號決議不涉及台灣，台灣並非中華人民共和國的一部分。台灣歷經長時間的努力才獲得國際社會的理解與支持，若此刻立委提案將兩岸關係定義為內戰，無疑是斷送台灣未來的國際生存空間。一旦中共攻打台灣，即使是想提供協助的國際盟友，也可能因中共宣稱這是「中國內戰」、「內政不容干涉」，而無法合法介入，使台灣陷入孤立無援的境地。作者認為，這種矮化國家主權以換取與中共談判的行為，基本上就是叛國。

不在籍投票的潛在危害

此外，藍白陣營還在推動不在籍投票的合法化。作者認為，如果不在籍投票通過，將對台灣的民主制度造成巨大衝擊。現行的秘密投票能有效防止黑金勢力掌握選民意向，但缺乏監管的不在籍投票（例如郵寄投票），可能導致黑道、金錢、暴力或脅迫介入，控制選民的投票意向，甚至可能出現冒名頂替、偽造選票等舞弊行為。台灣的選舉制度經過多年優化，已經成熟穩定、防弊性高、透明且有效率，目前完全沒有必要引進不在籍投票。

選舉制度的風險

作者進一步強調，連國民黨自己在之前的罷免連署中都曾出現「幽靈連署」，質疑其推動不在籍投票的可信度。他引用了南韓近期不在籍投票出現的亂象，以及有中國男性在TikTok上發布自己投票影片的案例，警告如果台灣通過不在籍投票，未來親台派可能再也無法贏得選舉，中共甚至可能利用台灣的民主制度來擊敗台灣。

結語：警惕真正的威脅

作者最後總結，當「館長」在扮演小丑、吸引媒體與大眾目光時，他正在分散大家對這些真正重要且可能對台灣未來造成嚴重傷害的立法院修法案的注意力。他呼籲觀眾務必將焦點轉回這些影響台灣人民切身利益的重大議題上，這才是更重要的事情。

================================================

This week's Pink Report. Hi everyone, welcome back. I'm your best anti-CCP investment advisor. Mr. Potter. To start this video. Let me share a heartwarming little story. I recently noticed a mobile game I occasionally play. "Counter United Front: Flames of War" Triggered China. Let me show you my account. I formed an Anti-CCP Alliance in the game. This week, the Hong Kong puppet government's national security bureau. Suddenly warned Hong Kong citizens. Not to play this game. They claimed this mobile game. Promotes Taiwan and Hong Kong independence. Anyone who displays, downloads, or plays it. And if you spend money in-game. To draw cards or make purchases. You'll be violating the Hong Kong National Security Law. Turns out I’ve done all of those things. Just playing a mobile game. And now I’ve become. A criminal in the eyes of the Hong Kong government. Who knew just playing a game nowadays. Could overthrow a regime. The bar for “offending China”. Is getting lower and lower. Offended, for sure. When have I *not* offended them? I hadn’t played for a while. But after seeing this news. I immediately jumped in for a ranked match. And here’s my highest rank in the game. Though I don’t play as much anymore. Based on my experience. The game is actually pretty simple. You complete missions and watch the story. Then draw cards and level up characters. Since I chose the Taiwan faction. My missions are basically. Taking down the CCP. It’s a fictional world based on real-world events. That builds a virtual alternate reality to play in. That’s it. And during gameplay. You can even choose to be the Red Army. You’re not limited to Taiwan or Hong Kong factions. How is that “subverting state power”? If the CCP is so upset, why don’t they just play? Spend a hundred million in-game. And dominate the leaderboards. It’s just a game—why so serious? And when the game first launched. It was hit by DDoS attacks from CCP cyber armies.

For a good while. Which affected player experience. Its popularity started to decline. But once Hong Kong authorities named it. Its visibility skyrocketed instead. It even shot up to. #1 on Hong Kong’s App Store chartEven the devs didn’t expect that. They later posted thanking the Hong Kong national security police. If they hadn’t said so. I would’ve thought the devs. Paid the HK government for promotion. But as discussions kept growing. Eventually the game. Was officially taken down in Hong Kong. According to the devs. To play in Hong Kong now. You have to use a VPN to change your region. Even Hong Kong has a firewall now. Though, honestly, not surprising. But the fact that a game can “overthrow the CCP”. Just shows how much. The CCP fears people coming together. If you just want to kill time. Or if you want to overthrow the CCP. I recommend this game. Also, this week, both inside and outside the Great Firewall. As long as you're online. You probably saw the news of “Captain” livestreaming in China. Everyone knows he’s now doing propaganda for the CCP. Lots of discussion inside China too. Two out of the top five Weibo topics. Were about him. Pitiful. Tragic. As a Taiwanese. Seeing Captain like this now. Is truly heartbreaking. He used to be a frontline anti-CCP fighter. That bold, outspoken, tough guy image. Once inspired many people. Including me. To join the anti-CCP cause. To defend Taiwan. Back then, he was criticizing the CCP. And calling out all the CCP bootlickers. 結果現在他卻活成自己最討厭的樣子。It’s honestly just sad. Although Captain’s CCP bootlicking is shameful. Given the current timing. It’s fine to laugh at him if you want. But we shouldn't give him too much attention. Because everything he's doing now. Is just a distraction from Taiwan’s recall movement. He’s wasting the time we need to correct our mistakes.

He’s going all-in on China. Becoming a united front puppet. Like a dead pig unafraid of boiling water. Scolding him now is pointless. I suggest we all encourage him. To apply for a Chinese ID. And I also call on the Little Pinks watching from behind the firewall. As well as the Taiwan Affairs Office. Please issue a Chinese ID to Captain ASAP. Look at his past political stances. He’s switched sides at least three times. There’s no guarantee he won’t flip again. Stop letting this guy flip-flop. It’s uncomfortable for both sides. I suggest the CCP just give him a passport. Because from what I see. Even Chinese netizens are roasting him. They’re criticizing him hard. No need to focus so much on this “Taiwan Province influencer”. When I first saw him, he had just been shot. He’s changed political camps at least three times in five or six years. Just treat it like a performance. Nothing more to it. Just don’t come mooching off us. So everything he said before doesn’t matter now? His “redemption tour”. Damn, best not come back. Flip sides, milk traffic from both ends. Captain and Zhong Mingxuan are cashing in from both camps. Classic fence-sitters. If this wasn’t planned, I wouldn’t believe it. Stop riding the fence. Scroll casually, it’s everywhere. And China has strict censorship. But the CCP allows this kind of content? That tells you one thing. Even the CCP looks down on Captain. Once he’s no longer useful. They’ll cut him off too. I also saw people inside the firewall. Sharing livestream clips, discussing how. A random Chinese passerby. Asked Captain what country he’s from. And he couldn’t answer. The comments were full of scolding. What a coward who doesn’t even dare answer. Yet people are still hyping him up. It’s just disappointing to honest folks. Not answering directly is an answer in itself. He doesn’t think he’s Chinese. If he were in another city. He’d be beaten up. Or pelted with eggs. Only in Shanghai nothing happens. He doesn’t even dare show a stance.

Why even come to China? This is a question he can’t avoid. There’s no reason to dodge it. Then just say it. What do you mean “forced to take a stance”? Is there even another answer? So I’m saying again. CCP officials should. Quickly give Captain a Chinese ID. And announce it publicly. So Taiwan can cancel his Taiwanese ID. Then CCP can use it internally. To say that Captain from Taiwan. Got his ID and returned to the motherland. And externally you can criticize DPP suppression. And the best part? No one in Taiwan will protest you giving him an ID. Because pro-CCP won’t protest. And even anti-CCP people won’t oppose this one. Giving him an ID. Is way more effective than just using him for propaganda. You’d basically have full support from Taiwan. That’s wild. What a brilliant idea. You’re welcome. So until Captain gets his Chinese ID. I don’t think we need to pay him any more attention. Let’s shift most of our focus. Back to things that truly affect Taiwanese people. That’s more important. Once you’ve paid attention and shared the right info. Then it’s okay to go laugh at Captain. While he plays the pro-CCP clown. And tries to draw all the attention. Meanwhile, in the Legislative Yuan, KMT and TPP legislators. They are pushing legislative amendments. The KMT and TPP want to redefine. Cross-strait relations as a civil war. Take a look at the legislators behind this proposal. These are politicians betraying Taiwan. Many of them are currently facing recall. They no longer care. Whether they’ll be re-elected. They’re just trying to use their remaining power. To act as inside agents for China. Paving the way for a CCP invasion. Let me tell you—their goal with this. Is to create legal justification for a Chinese invasion. These amendments also align with. Article 3 of China’s Anti-Secession Law. Their wording echoes CCP propaganda. Right now the U.S. and many. Other democratic nations. Agree that. UN Resolution 2758 does not include Taiwan.

Taiwan is not part of the PRC. The CCP should not use 2758. To block Taiwan from joining international organizations. Taiwan has worked so hard for so long. To get to this point. Other countries have finally come to understand the situation. And are willing to support Taiwan. But at this time. If blue-white legislators propose amendments. To redefine cross-strait relations. As a civil war. That would completely block Taiwan’s future path. If China invades Taiwan. Even democratic allies who want to help. Could be stopped by China saying—. “This is a civil war between us”. “You foreign countries shouldn't interfere in China’s internal affairs”. “Didn’t your own Taiwan legislators say”. “That cross-strait relations are a civil war?”. That would leave Taiwan isolated and helpless. Even countries that wanted to help would be powerless. Now the KMT is also pushing amendments. To downplay our national sovereignty. In exchange for negotiations with the CCP. This blue-white camp behavior is basically treason. Can’t we just arrest them? They also want to legalize absentee voting. If that passes. Taiwan’s democracy will take a heavy hit. Right now voting is secret. Black money can’t confirm. Who the voter actually supported. But if absentee voting is allowed. Ballots will be mailed to homes. Gangsters can just show up at someone’s house. Use money, violence, or threats. To control their vote. With zero oversight. They could even forge votes on behalf of others. Using fake identities. To apply for absentee ballots. The bill has already passed second reading. Once absentee voting is enacted. The results at polling stations. Will no longer be decisive. We’ll be relying on ballots. That can’t be seen or monitored. The credibility of elections will collapse. Taiwan’s electoral system has been refined for years. It is mature and stable. One of the most tamper-proof,. Transparent and efficient systems in the world. There’s absolutely no need to introduce. Absentee voting right now. The KMT even had ghost signatures.

In the recall petitions. How can we trust them on absentee voting? Even South Korea recently showed us. The chaos absentee voting can bring. On TikTok, there were even Chinese men. Recording themselves while voting. If something like that happens in Taiwan. The pro-Taiwan camp won’t win again. The CCP could defeat you using your own democracy. So while Captain plays the clown,. He’s distracting you. From paying attention to these issues. If you didn’t know before,. Good thing you know now. Please share this with more people. The third phase of the recall vote. Is expected to be held. On a Saturday between July 10 and August 19. So keep your schedule open from July to mid-August. Don’t travel abroad. Let’s join forces to fight the traitors. Make sure you go vote when the time comes. Vote YES to recall. Vote YES to recall the KMT. Is the same as voting to recall the CCP. It’s how we defend our rights as Taiwanese. Let’s do this, everyone! Now to end today’s video—. There’s no clown segment. But there is something important to remind you. Let me first say—this is not to cause panic. It’s to reduce anxiety. I’m inviting you all to take this action together. To take shared responsibility for our island. That means your personal go-bag. If you haven’t started preparing it,. Please begin now. If you already have one—great, well done! Then review it again. See if there’s anything missing. When disaster strikes. Don’t just passively wait for rescue. Do what you can in advance. So you won’t become a burden. It’s your responsibility. To yourself and to Taiwanese society. I’m not the only one saying this. The U.S. military and AIT. Have also been repeatedly sending out warnings. Earlier I showed you. A video of a U.S. congressional hearing. In which U.S. military officials warned Taiwan. That the CCP is preparing to invade by 2027. The U.S. Secretary of Defense also publicly stated. That China is actively rehearsing to invade Taiwan.

Last week, AIT also posted that. If you’re a teacher. You can register for a free first aid workshop. With hands-on instruction. And receive a certificate of completion. And official teacher training hours. These announcements. Along with this week’s update. From AIT’s Kaohsiung office. Also reminded people. How to prepare a go-bag. With so many reminders from the U.S. That China is preparing for an invasion. And AIT posting warning after warning. And even changing their cover photo. To “Be Ready, Be Safe”. I think it’s no longer a subtle hint. It’s a clear call for everyone to be prepared. So I urge you to get up and get ready. Go buy your emergency supplies. Hopefully you’ll never need them. But buying them doesn’t hurt. Just eat them before they expire. And if disaster does happen. At least you’ll be prepared. And not left helpless or panicked. Taiwan has frequent earthquakes. And natural disasters aren’t uncommon here. So having supplies ready. Can help in many types of situations. The idea of a go-bag. Is to give you time and flexibility in a crisis. So your life isn’t severely disrupted. I personally recommend having at least 3 days of food. And a supply of clean drinking water. In your emergency kit. If you can prepare for over two weeks, even better. You might not end up needing it. But if you ever do. It could be life-saving. Again, no need to panic just yet. In fact, the more prepared you are. The more your anxiety will naturally decrease. Especially when you see more and more people joining in. It really shifts your mindset. A fully mobilized society. A Taiwan with strong resilience. Requires all of us to work together. And that will make any invader. Think twice before acting. Stay strong, everyone. Stay strong, Taiwan. That’s all for today’s video. If you liked it, please give it a thumbs up and subscribe. You're also welcome to join my YouTube channel membership.

And support this series. I'm Potter King. See you in the next video. Bye-bye.

=============

作者提到，由於他過去曾玩過這款遊戲、組成反共聯盟並在遊戲內消費，按照港府的說法，他已經成為了「罪犯」，不禁感嘆如今「得罪中國」的門檻越來越低。他認為這款遊戲內容其實相當單純，主要是完成任務、看故事、抽卡升級，玩家甚至可以選擇紅軍陣營，不解這如何構成「顛覆國家政權」。遊戲初推出時曾遭受中共網軍的DDoS攻擊，人氣一度下滑，然而港府的公開點名反而意外提升了遊戲的知名度，使其一度衝上香港App Store下載榜首，最終才被下架，需要在香港境外或使用VPN才能遊玩。作者認為，這起事件顯示出中共對於人民串聯集結的極度恐懼。

前反共鬥士的立場轉變

接著，作者轉向討論近期在網路內外引發廣泛關注的「館長」在中國進行直播的事件。作者表示，這位過去曾是台灣重要的反共前線鬥士，其大膽、敢言、硬漢的形象，曾經啟發了許多人投入反共行列、保衛台灣。然而，如今「館長」卻開始為中共進行統戰宣傳，活成了自己過去最討厭的樣子，這讓作者身為台灣人，感到非常心痛與悲哀。

對「館長」現象的分析與建議

作者認為，雖然「館長」投共的行為令人羞愧，但在這個時間點上，過度關注他並無益處，因為他現在所做的一切，很可能是在為台灣目前正熱烈進行的罷免不適任立委等運動進行轉移注意力。作者認為「館長」已經「一條龍服務到底」，成為了統戰傀儡，再多的謾罵也已無意義。他反而建議大家應該「鼓勵」他申請中國的居民身份證。

作者呼籲所有牆內的網友、國台辦等相關單位，盡快核發中國居民身份證給「館長」，並公開宣布。這樣一來，台灣方面就能順理成章地註銷他的台灣身份證，從而結束他這種左右搖擺、兩邊吃流量的狀態。作者認為，這樣做對中共來說效益更大，可以作為對內宣傳（台灣人回歸祖國）和對外批評（民進黨打壓）的案例。甚至連台灣的親共派和反共派對此都不會有意見，可謂「完全支持」的絕妙主意。作者總結，在「館長」取得中國身份證之前，無需再給予他過多關注。

立法院的潛在國安危機

作者強調，在「館長」扮演小丑、分散大家注意力時，真正需要高度關注的是台灣立法院內正在發生的重要議題。國民黨和民眾黨的部分立委，正在推動一系列修法，企圖將兩岸關係重新定義為內戰。作者直言這些立委是「賣台政客」，他們的目標是為中共武力犯台製造合法的藉口，為中共提供「內部策應」。

內戰定義與國際空間

作者指出，將兩岸關係定義為內戰，與中國的《反分裂國家法》第三條相互呼應，其用詞也與中共的統戰宣傳雷同。當前國際社會（包括美國及許多民主國家）已普遍認可聯合國2758號決議不涉及台灣，台灣並非中華人民共和國的一部分。台灣歷經長時間的努力才獲得國際社會的理解與支持，若此刻立委提案將兩岸關係定義為內戰，無疑是斷送台灣未來的國際生存空間。一旦中共攻打台灣，即使是想提供協助的國際盟友，也可能因中共宣稱這是「中國內戰」、「內政不容干涉」，而無法合法介入，使台灣陷入孤立無援的境地。作者認為，這種矮化國家主權以換取與中共談判的行為，基本上就是叛國。

不在籍投票的潛在危害

此外，藍白陣營還在推動不在籍投票的合法化。作者認為，如果不在籍投票通過，將對台灣的民主制度造成巨大衝擊。現行的秘密投票能有效防止黑金勢力掌握選民意向，但缺乏監管的不在籍投票（例如郵寄投票），可能導致黑道、金錢、暴力或脅迫介入，控制選民的投票意向，甚至可能出現冒名頂替、偽造選票等舞弊行為。台灣的選舉制度經過多年優化，已經成熟穩定、防弊性高、透明且有效率，目前完全沒有必要引進不在籍投票。

選舉制度的風險

作者進一步強調，連國民黨自己在之前的罷免連署中都曾出現「幽靈連署」，質疑其推動不在籍投票的可信度。他引用了南韓近期不在籍投票出現的亂象，以及有中國男性在TikTok上發布自己投票影片的案例，警告如果台灣通過不在籍投票，未來親台派可能再也無法贏得選舉，中共甚至可能利用台灣的民主制度來擊敗台灣。

結語：警惕真正的威脅

作者最後總結，當「館長」在扮演小丑、吸引媒體與大眾目光時，他正在分散大家對這些真正重要且可能對台灣未來造成嚴重傷害的立法院修法案的注意力。他呼籲觀眾務必將焦點轉回這些影響台灣人民切身利益的重大議題上，這才是更重要的事情。

================================================

This week's Pink Report. Hi everyone, welcome back. I'm your best anti-CCP investment advisor. Mr. Potter. To start this video. Let me share a heartwarming little story. I recently noticed a mobile game I occasionally play. "Counter United Front: Flames of War" Triggered China. Let me show you my account. I formed an Anti-CCP Alliance in the game. This week, the Hong Kong puppet government's national security bureau. Suddenly warned Hong Kong citizens. Not to play this game. They claimed this mobile game. Promotes Taiwan and Hong Kong independence. Anyone who displays, downloads, or plays it. And if you spend money in-game. To draw cards or make purchases. You'll be violating the Hong Kong National Security Law. Turns out I’ve done all of those things. Just playing a mobile game. And now I’ve become. A criminal in the eyes of the Hong Kong government. Who knew just playing a game nowadays. Could overthrow a regime. The bar for “offending China”. Is getting lower and lower. Offended, for sure. When have I *not* offended them? I hadn’t played for a while. But after seeing this news. I immediately jumped in for a ranked match. And here’s my highest rank in the game. Though I don’t play as much anymore. Based on my experience. The game is actually pretty simple. You complete missions and watch the story. Then draw cards and level up characters. Since I chose the Taiwan faction. My missions are basically. Taking down the CCP. It’s a fictional world based on real-world events. That builds a virtual alternate reality to play in. That’s it. And during gameplay. You can even choose to be the Red Army. You’re not limited to Taiwan or Hong Kong factions. How is that “subverting state power”? If the CCP is so upset, why don’t they just play? Spend a hundred million in-game. And dominate the leaderboards. It’s just a game—why so serious? And when the game first launched. It was hit by DDoS attacks from CCP cyber armies.

For a good while. Which affected player experience. Its popularity started to decline. But once Hong Kong authorities named it. Its visibility skyrocketed instead. It even shot up to. #1 on Hong Kong’s App Store chartEven the devs didn’t expect that. They later posted thanking the Hong Kong national security police. If they hadn’t said so. I would’ve thought the devs. Paid the HK government for promotion. But as discussions kept growing. Eventually the game. Was officially taken down in Hong Kong. According to the devs. To play in Hong Kong now. You have to use a VPN to change your region. Even Hong Kong has a firewall now. Though, honestly, not surprising. But the fact that a game can “overthrow the CCP”. Just shows how much. The CCP fears people coming together. If you just want to kill time. Or if you want to overthrow the CCP. I recommend this game. Also, this week, both inside and outside the Great Firewall. As long as you're online. You probably saw the news of “Captain” livestreaming in China. Everyone knows he’s now doing propaganda for the CCP. Lots of discussion inside China too. Two out of the top five Weibo topics. Were about him. Pitiful. Tragic. As a Taiwanese. Seeing Captain like this now. Is truly heartbreaking. He used to be a frontline anti-CCP fighter. That bold, outspoken, tough guy image. Once inspired many people. Including me. To join the anti-CCP cause. To defend Taiwan. Back then, he was criticizing the CCP. And calling out all the CCP bootlickers. 結果現在他卻活成自己最討厭的樣子。It’s honestly just sad. Although Captain’s CCP bootlicking is shameful. Given the current timing. It’s fine to laugh at him if you want. But we shouldn't give him too much attention. Because everything he's doing now. Is just a distraction from Taiwan’s recall movement. He’s wasting the time we need to correct our mistakes.

He’s going all-in on China. Becoming a united front puppet. Like a dead pig unafraid of boiling water. Scolding him now is pointless. I suggest we all encourage him. To apply for a Chinese ID. And I also call on the Little Pinks watching from behind the firewall. As well as the Taiwan Affairs Office. Please issue a Chinese ID to Captain ASAP. Look at his past political stances. He’s switched sides at least three times. There’s no guarantee he won’t flip again. Stop letting this guy flip-flop. It’s uncomfortable for both sides. I suggest the CCP just give him a passport. Because from what I see. Even Chinese netizens are roasting him. They’re criticizing him hard. No need to focus so much on this “Taiwan Province influencer”. When I first saw him, he had just been shot. He’s changed political camps at least three times in five or six years. Just treat it like a performance. Nothing more to it. Just don’t come mooching off us. So everything he said before doesn’t matter now? His “redemption tour”. Damn, best not come back. Flip sides, milk traffic from both ends. Captain and Zhong Mingxuan are cashing in from both camps. Classic fence-sitters. If this wasn’t planned, I wouldn’t believe it. Stop riding the fence. Scroll casually, it’s everywhere. And China has strict censorship. But the CCP allows this kind of content? That tells you one thing. Even the CCP looks down on Captain. Once he’s no longer useful. They’ll cut him off too. I also saw people inside the firewall. Sharing livestream clips, discussing how. A random Chinese passerby. Asked Captain what country he’s from. And he couldn’t answer. The comments were full of scolding. What a coward who doesn’t even dare answer. Yet people are still hyping him up. It’s just disappointing to honest folks. Not answering directly is an answer in itself. He doesn’t think he’s Chinese. If he were in another city. He’d be beaten up. Or pelted with eggs. Only in Shanghai nothing happens. He doesn’t even dare show a stance.

Why even come to China? This is a question he can’t avoid. There’s no reason to dodge it. Then just say it. What do you mean “forced to take a stance”? Is there even another answer? So I’m saying again. CCP officials should. Quickly give Captain a Chinese ID. And announce it publicly. So Taiwan can cancel his Taiwanese ID. Then CCP can use it internally. To say that Captain from Taiwan. Got his ID and returned to the motherland. And externally you can criticize DPP suppression. And the best part? No one in Taiwan will protest you giving him an ID. Because pro-CCP won’t protest. And even anti-CCP people won’t oppose this one. Giving him an ID. Is way more effective than just using him for propaganda. You’d basically have full support from Taiwan. That’s wild. What a brilliant idea. You’re welcome. So until Captain gets his Chinese ID. I don’t think we need to pay him any more attention. Let’s shift most of our focus. Back to things that truly affect Taiwanese people. That’s more important. Once you’ve paid attention and shared the right info. Then it’s okay to go laugh at Captain. While he plays the pro-CCP clown. And tries to draw all the attention. Meanwhile, in the Legislative Yuan, KMT and TPP legislators. They are pushing legislative amendments. The KMT and TPP want to redefine. Cross-strait relations as a civil war. Take a look at the legislators behind this proposal. These are politicians betraying Taiwan. Many of them are currently facing recall. They no longer care. Whether they’ll be re-elected. They’re just trying to use their remaining power. To act as inside agents for China. Paving the way for a CCP invasion. Let me tell you—their goal with this. Is to create legal justification for a Chinese invasion. These amendments also align with. Article 3 of China’s Anti-Secession Law. Their wording echoes CCP propaganda. Right now the U.S. and many. Other democratic nations. Agree that. UN Resolution 2758 does not include Taiwan.

Taiwan is not part of the PRC. The CCP should not use 2758. To block Taiwan from joining international organizations. Taiwan has worked so hard for so long. To get to this point. Other countries have finally come to understand the situation. And are willing to support Taiwan. But at this time. If blue-white legislators propose amendments. To redefine cross-strait relations. As a civil war. That would completely block Taiwan’s future path. If China invades Taiwan. Even democratic allies who want to help. Could be stopped by China saying—. “This is a civil war between us”. “You foreign countries shouldn't interfere in China’s internal affairs”. “Didn’t your own Taiwan legislators say”. “That cross-strait relations are a civil war?”. That would leave Taiwan isolated and helpless. Even countries that wanted to help would be powerless. Now the KMT is also pushing amendments. To downplay our national sovereignty. In exchange for negotiations with the CCP. This blue-white camp behavior is basically treason. Can’t we just arrest them? They also want to legalize absentee voting. If that passes. Taiwan’s democracy will take a heavy hit. Right now voting is secret. Black money can’t confirm. Who the voter actually supported. But if absentee voting is allowed. Ballots will be mailed to homes. Gangsters can just show up at someone’s house. Use money, violence, or threats. To control their vote. With zero oversight. They could even forge votes on behalf of others. Using fake identities. To apply for absentee ballots. The bill has already passed second reading. Once absentee voting is enacted. The results at polling stations. Will no longer be decisive. We’ll be relying on ballots. That can’t be seen or monitored. The credibility of elections will collapse. Taiwan’s electoral system has been refined for years. It is mature and stable. One of the most tamper-proof,. Transparent and efficient systems in the world. There’s absolutely no need to introduce. Absentee voting right now. The KMT even had ghost signatures.

In the recall petitions. How can we trust them on absentee voting? Even South Korea recently showed us. The chaos absentee voting can bring. On TikTok, there were even Chinese men. Recording themselves while voting. If something like that happens in Taiwan. The pro-Taiwan camp won’t win again. The CCP could defeat you using your own democracy. So while Captain plays the clown,. He’s distracting you. From paying attention to these issues. If you didn’t know before,. Good thing you know now. Please share this with more people. The third phase of the recall vote. Is expected to be held. On a Saturday between July 10 and August 19. So keep your schedule open from July to mid-August. Don’t travel abroad. Let’s join forces to fight the traitors. Make sure you go vote when the time comes. Vote YES to recall. Vote YES to recall the KMT. Is the same as voting to recall the CCP. It’s how we defend our rights as Taiwanese. Let’s do this, everyone! Now to end today’s video—. There’s no clown segment. But there is something important to remind you. Let me first say—this is not to cause panic. It’s to reduce anxiety. I’m inviting you all to take this action together. To take shared responsibility for our island. That means your personal go-bag. If you haven’t started preparing it,. Please begin now. If you already have one—great, well done! Then review it again. See if there’s anything missing. When disaster strikes. Don’t just passively wait for rescue. Do what you can in advance. So you won’t become a burden. It’s your responsibility. To yourself and to Taiwanese society. I’m not the only one saying this. The U.S. military and AIT. Have also been repeatedly sending out warnings. Earlier I showed you. A video of a U.S. congressional hearing. In which U.S. military officials warned Taiwan. That the CCP is preparing to invade by 2027. The U.S. Secretary of Defense also publicly stated. That China is actively rehearsing to invade Taiwan.

Last week, AIT also posted that. If you’re a teacher. You can register for a free first aid workshop. With hands-on instruction. And receive a certificate of completion. And official teacher training hours. These announcements. Along with this week’s update. From AIT’s Kaohsiung office. Also reminded people. How to prepare a go-bag. With so many reminders from the U.S. That China is preparing for an invasion. And AIT posting warning after warning. And even changing their cover photo. To “Be Ready, Be Safe”. I think it’s no longer a subtle hint. It’s a clear call for everyone to be prepared. So I urge you to get up and get ready. Go buy your emergency supplies. Hopefully you’ll never need them. But buying them doesn’t hurt. Just eat them before they expire. And if disaster does happen. At least you’ll be prepared. And not left helpless or panicked. Taiwan has frequent earthquakes. And natural disasters aren’t uncommon here. So having supplies ready. Can help in many types of situations. The idea of a go-bag. Is to give you time and flexibility in a crisis. So your life isn’t severely disrupted. I personally recommend having at least 3 days of food. And a supply of clean drinking water. In your emergency kit. If you can prepare for over two weeks, even better. You might not end up needing it. But if you ever do. It could be life-saving. Again, no need to panic just yet. In fact, the more prepared you are. The more your anxiety will naturally decrease. Especially when you see more and more people joining in. It really shifts your mindset. A fully mobilized society. A Taiwan with strong resilience. Requires all of us to work together. And that will make any invader. Think twice before acting. Stay strong, everyone. Stay strong, Taiwan. That’s all for today’s video. If you liked it, please give it a thumbs up and subscribe. You're also welcome to join my YouTube channel membership.

And support this series. I'm Potter King. See you in the next video. Bye-bye.

=============

逆統戰手遊辱華！中共點名下架該遊戲

item.content:encoded:
值得閱讀的理由

  • 了解香港政府如何因一款手遊而動用國安法，並看見中國共產黨對言論和結社的恐懼程度。
  • 追蹤並分析一位知名反共人士轉變立場至親共的原因與影響，以及作者對此現象的批判與建議。
  • 認識台灣立法院內，部分立法委員推動可能損害台灣主權與民主制度的修法案（如定義兩岸關係為內戰、不在籍投票合法化），以及這些修法案對台灣國際地位與國家安全的潛在威脅。

摘要

影片一開始，作者分享了一款名為「逆統戰：鋼鐵火炬」的手機遊戲，如何意外地引發了中國共產黨的敏感神經。這款遊戲提供不同的陣營選擇，包括台灣和香港，甚至包含紅軍。然而，香港特區政府的國安單位突然發出警告，聲稱這款遊戲宣揚台獨港獨，並指明任何展示、下載、遊玩甚至在遊戲內消費的行為，都可能違反香港國安法。

手遊引發的國安恐慌

作者提到，由於他過去曾玩過這款遊戲、組成反共聯盟並在遊戲內消費，按照港府的說法，他已經成為了「罪犯」，不禁感嘆如今「得罪中國」的門檻越來越低。他認為這款遊戲內容其實相當單純，主要是完成任務、看故事、抽卡升級，玩家甚至可以選擇紅軍陣營，不解這如何構成「顛覆國家政權」。遊戲初推出時曾遭受中共網軍的DDoS攻擊，人氣一度下滑，然而港府的公開點名反而意外提升了遊戲的知名度，使其一度衝上香港App Store下載榜首，最終才被下架，需要在香港境外或使用VPN才能遊玩。作者認為，這起事件顯示出中共對於人民串聯集結的極度恐懼。

前反共鬥士的立場轉變

接著，作者轉向討論近期在網路內外引發廣泛關注的「館長」在中國進行直播的事件。作者表示，這位過去曾是台灣重要的反共前線鬥士，其大膽、敢言、硬漢的形象，曾經啟發了許多人投入反共行列、保衛台灣。然而，如今「館長」卻開始為中共進行統戰宣傳，活成了自己過去最討厭的樣子，這讓作者身為台灣人，感到非常心痛與悲哀。

對「館長」現象的分析與建議

作者認為，雖然「館長」投共的行為令人羞愧，但在這個時間點上，過度關注他並無益處，因為他現在所做的一切，很可能是在為台灣目前正熱烈進行的罷免不適任立委等運動進行轉移注意力。作者認為「館長」已經「一條龍服務到底」，成為了統戰傀儡，再多的謾罵也已無意義。他反而建議大家應該「鼓勵」他申請中國的居民身份證。

作者呼籲所有牆內的網友、國台辦等相關單位，盡快核發中國居民身份證給「館長」，並公開宣布。這樣一來，台灣方面就能順理成章地註銷他的台灣身份證，從而結束他這種左右搖擺、兩邊吃流量的狀態。作者認為，這樣做對中共來說效益更大，可以作為對內宣傳（台灣人回歸祖國）和對外批評（民進黨打壓）的案例。甚至連台灣的親共派和反共派對此都不會有意見，可謂「完全支持」的絕妙主意。作者總結，在「館長」取得中國身份證之前，無需再給予他過多關注。

立法院的潛在國安危機

作者強調，在「館長」扮演小丑、分散大家注意力時，真正需要高度關注的是台灣立法院內正在發生的重要議題。國民黨和民眾黨的部分立委，正在推動一系列修法，企圖將兩岸關係重新定義為內戰。作者直言這些立委是「賣台政客」，他們的目標是為中共武力犯台製造合法的藉口，為中共提供「內部策應」。

內戰定義與國際空間

作者指出，將兩岸關係定義為內戰，與中國的《反分裂國家法》第三條相互呼應，其用詞也與中共的統戰宣傳雷同。當前國際社會（包括美國及許多民主國家）已普遍認可聯合國2758號決議不涉及台灣，台灣並非中華人民共和國的一部分。台灣歷經長時間的努力才獲得國際社會的理解與支持，若此刻立委提案將兩岸關係定義為內戰，無疑是斷送台灣未來的國際生存空間。一旦中共攻打台灣，即使是想提供協助的國際盟友，也可能因中共宣稱這是「中國內戰」、「內政不容干涉」，而無法合法介入，使台灣陷入孤立無援的境地。作者認為，這種矮化國家主權以換取與中共談判的行為，基本上就是叛國。

不在籍投票的潛在危害

此外，藍白陣營還在推動不在籍投票的合法化。作者認為，如果不在籍投票通過，將對台灣的民主制度造成巨大衝擊。現行的秘密投票能有效防止黑金勢力掌握選民意向，但缺乏監管的不在籍投票（例如郵寄投票），可能導致黑道、金錢、暴力或脅迫介入，控制選民的投票意向，甚至可能出現冒名頂替、偽造選票等舞弊行為。台灣的選舉制度經過多年優化，已經成熟穩定、防弊性高、透明且有效率，目前完全沒有必要引進不在籍投票。

選舉制度的風險

作者進一步強調，連國民黨自己在之前的罷免連署中都曾出現「幽靈連署」，質疑其推動不在籍投票的可信度。他引用了南韓近期不在籍投票出現的亂象，以及有中國男性在TikTok上發布自己投票影片的案例，警告如果台灣通過不在籍投票，未來親台派可能再也無法贏得選舉，中共甚至可能利用台灣的民主制度來擊敗台灣。

結語：警惕真正的威脅

作者最後總結，當「館長」在扮演小丑、吸引媒體與大眾目光時，他正在分散大家對這些真正重要且可能對台灣未來造成嚴重傷害的立法院修法案的注意力。他呼籲觀眾務必將焦點轉回這些影響台灣人民切身利益的重大議題上，這才是更重要的事情。

================================================

This week's Pink Report. Hi everyone, welcome back. I'm your best anti-CCP investment advisor. Mr. Potter. To start this video. Let me share a heartwarming little story. I recently noticed a mobile game I occasionally play. "Counter United Front: Flames of War" Triggered China. Let me show you my account. I formed an Anti-CCP Alliance in the game. This week, the Hong Kong puppet government's national security bureau. Suddenly warned Hong Kong citizens. Not to play this game. They claimed this mobile game. Promotes Taiwan and Hong Kong independence. Anyone who displays, downloads, or plays it. And if you spend money in-game. To draw cards or make purchases. You'll be violating the Hong Kong National Security Law. Turns out I’ve done all of those things. Just playing a mobile game. And now I’ve become. A criminal in the eyes of the Hong Kong government. Who knew just playing a game nowadays. Could overthrow a regime. The bar for “offending China”. Is getting lower and lower. Offended, for sure. When have I *not* offended them? I hadn’t played for a while. But after seeing this news. I immediately jumped in for a ranked match. And here’s my highest rank in the game. Though I don’t play as much anymore. Based on my experience. The game is actually pretty simple. You complete missions and watch the story. Then draw cards and level up characters. Since I chose the Taiwan faction. My missions are basically. Taking down the CCP. It’s a fictional world based on real-world events. That builds a virtual alternate reality to play in. That’s it. And during gameplay. You can even choose to be the Red Army. You’re not limited to Taiwan or Hong Kong factions. How is that “subverting state power”? If the CCP is so upset, why don’t they just play? Spend a hundred million in-game. And dominate the leaderboards. It’s just a game—why so serious? And when the game first launched. It was hit by DDoS attacks from CCP cyber armies.

For a good while. Which affected player experience. Its popularity started to decline. But once Hong Kong authorities named it. Its visibility skyrocketed instead. It even shot up to. #1 on Hong Kong’s App Store chartEven the devs didn’t expect that. They later posted thanking the Hong Kong national security police. If they hadn’t said so. I would’ve thought the devs. Paid the HK government for promotion. But as discussions kept growing. Eventually the game. Was officially taken down in Hong Kong. According to the devs. To play in Hong Kong now. You have to use a VPN to change your region. Even Hong Kong has a firewall now. Though, honestly, not surprising. But the fact that a game can “overthrow the CCP”. Just shows how much. The CCP fears people coming together. If you just want to kill time. Or if you want to overthrow the CCP. I recommend this game. Also, this week, both inside and outside the Great Firewall. As long as you're online. You probably saw the news of “Captain” livestreaming in China. Everyone knows he’s now doing propaganda for the CCP. Lots of discussion inside China too. Two out of the top five Weibo topics. Were about him. Pitiful. Tragic. As a Taiwanese. Seeing Captain like this now. Is truly heartbreaking. He used to be a frontline anti-CCP fighter. That bold, outspoken, tough guy image. Once inspired many people. Including me. To join the anti-CCP cause. To defend Taiwan. Back then, he was criticizing the CCP. And calling out all the CCP bootlickers. 結果現在他卻活成自己最討厭的樣子。It’s honestly just sad. Although Captain’s CCP bootlicking is shameful. Given the current timing. It’s fine to laugh at him if you want. But we shouldn't give him too much attention. Because everything he's doing now. Is just a distraction from Taiwan’s recall movement. He’s wasting the time we need to correct our mistakes.

He’s going all-in on China. Becoming a united front puppet. Like a dead pig unafraid of boiling water. Scolding him now is pointless. I suggest we all encourage him. To apply for a Chinese ID. And I also call on the Little Pinks watching from behind the firewall. As well as the Taiwan Affairs Office. Please issue a Chinese ID to Captain ASAP. Look at his past political stances. He’s switched sides at least three times. There’s no guarantee he won’t flip again. Stop letting this guy flip-flop. It’s uncomfortable for both sides. I suggest the CCP just give him a passport. Because from what I see. Even Chinese netizens are roasting him. They’re criticizing him hard. No need to focus so much on this “Taiwan Province influencer”. When I first saw him, he had just been shot. He’s changed political camps at least three times in five or six years. Just treat it like a performance. Nothing more to it. Just don’t come mooching off us. So everything he said before doesn’t matter now? His “redemption tour”. Damn, best not come back. Flip sides, milk traffic from both ends. Captain and Zhong Mingxuan are cashing in from both camps. Classic fence-sitters. If this wasn’t planned, I wouldn’t believe it. Stop riding the fence. Scroll casually, it’s everywhere. And China has strict censorship. But the CCP allows this kind of content? That tells you one thing. Even the CCP looks down on Captain. Once he’s no longer useful. They’ll cut him off too. I also saw people inside the firewall. Sharing livestream clips, discussing how. A random Chinese passerby. Asked Captain what country he’s from. And he couldn’t answer. The comments were full of scolding. What a coward who doesn’t even dare answer. Yet people are still hyping him up. It’s just disappointing to honest folks. Not answering directly is an answer in itself. He doesn’t think he’s Chinese. If he were in another city. He’d be beaten up. Or pelted with eggs. Only in Shanghai nothing happens. He doesn’t even dare show a stance.

Why even come to China? This is a question he can’t avoid. There’s no reason to dodge it. Then just say it. What do you mean “forced to take a stance”? Is there even another answer? So I’m saying again. CCP officials should. Quickly give Captain a Chinese ID. And announce it publicly. So Taiwan can cancel his Taiwanese ID. Then CCP can use it internally. To say that Captain from Taiwan. Got his ID and returned to the motherland. And externally you can criticize DPP suppression. And the best part? No one in Taiwan will protest you giving him an ID. Because pro-CCP won’t protest. And even anti-CCP people won’t oppose this one. Giving him an ID. Is way more effective than just using him for propaganda. You’d basically have full support from Taiwan. That’s wild. What a brilliant idea. You’re welcome. So until Captain gets his Chinese ID. I don’t think we need to pay him any more attention. Let’s shift most of our focus. Back to things that truly affect Taiwanese people. That’s more important. Once you’ve paid attention and shared the right info. Then it’s okay to go laugh at Captain. While he plays the pro-CCP clown. And tries to draw all the attention. Meanwhile, in the Legislative Yuan, KMT and TPP legislators. They are pushing legislative amendments. The KMT and TPP want to redefine. Cross-strait relations as a civil war. Take a look at the legislators behind this proposal. These are politicians betraying Taiwan. Many of them are currently facing recall. They no longer care. Whether they’ll be re-elected. They’re just trying to use their remaining power. To act as inside agents for China. Paving the way for a CCP invasion. Let me tell you—their goal with this. Is to create legal justification for a Chinese invasion. These amendments also align with. Article 3 of China’s Anti-Secession Law. Their wording echoes CCP propaganda. Right now the U.S. and many. Other democratic nations. Agree that. UN Resolution 2758 does not include Taiwan.

Taiwan is not part of the PRC. The CCP should not use 2758. To block Taiwan from joining international organizations. Taiwan has worked so hard for so long. To get to this point. Other countries have finally come to understand the situation. And are willing to support Taiwan. But at this time. If blue-white legislators propose amendments. To redefine cross-strait relations. As a civil war. That would completely block Taiwan’s future path. If China invades Taiwan. Even democratic allies who want to help. Could be stopped by China saying—. “This is a civil war between us”. “You foreign countries shouldn't interfere in China’s internal affairs”. “Didn’t your own Taiwan legislators say”. “That cross-strait relations are a civil war?”. That would leave Taiwan isolated and helpless. Even countries that wanted to help would be powerless. Now the KMT is also pushing amendments. To downplay our national sovereignty. In exchange for negotiations with the CCP. This blue-white camp behavior is basically treason. Can’t we just arrest them? They also want to legalize absentee voting. If that passes. Taiwan’s democracy will take a heavy hit. Right now voting is secret. Black money can’t confirm. Who the voter actually supported. But if absentee voting is allowed. Ballots will be mailed to homes. Gangsters can just show up at someone’s house. Use money, violence, or threats. To control their vote. With zero oversight. They could even forge votes on behalf of others. Using fake identities. To apply for absentee ballots. The bill has already passed second reading. Once absentee voting is enacted. The results at polling stations. Will no longer be decisive. We’ll be relying on ballots. That can’t be seen or monitored. The credibility of elections will collapse. Taiwan’s electoral system has been refined for years. It is mature and stable. One of the most tamper-proof,. Transparent and efficient systems in the world. There’s absolutely no need to introduce. Absentee voting right now. The KMT even had ghost signatures.

In the recall petitions. How can we trust them on absentee voting? Even South Korea recently showed us. The chaos absentee voting can bring. On TikTok, there were even Chinese men. Recording themselves while voting. If something like that happens in Taiwan. The pro-Taiwan camp won’t win again. The CCP could defeat you using your own democracy. So while Captain plays the clown,. He’s distracting you. From paying attention to these issues. If you didn’t know before,. Good thing you know now. Please share this with more people. The third phase of the recall vote. Is expected to be held. On a Saturday between July 10 and August 19. So keep your schedule open from July to mid-August. Don’t travel abroad. Let’s join forces to fight the traitors. Make sure you go vote when the time comes. Vote YES to recall. Vote YES to recall the KMT. Is the same as voting to recall the CCP. It’s how we defend our rights as Taiwanese. Let’s do this, everyone! Now to end today’s video—. There’s no clown segment. But there is something important to remind you. Let me first say—this is not to cause panic. It’s to reduce anxiety. I’m inviting you all to take this action together. To take shared responsibility for our island. That means your personal go-bag. If you haven’t started preparing it,. Please begin now. If you already have one—great, well done! Then review it again. See if there’s anything missing. When disaster strikes. Don’t just passively wait for rescue. Do what you can in advance. So you won’t become a burden. It’s your responsibility. To yourself and to Taiwanese society. I’m not the only one saying this. The U.S. military and AIT. Have also been repeatedly sending out warnings. Earlier I showed you. A video of a U.S. congressional hearing. In which U.S. military officials warned Taiwan. That the CCP is preparing to invade by 2027. The U.S. Secretary of Defense also publicly stated. That China is actively rehearsing to invade Taiwan.

Last week, AIT also posted that. If you’re a teacher. You can register for a free first aid workshop. With hands-on instruction. And receive a certificate of completion. And official teacher training hours. These announcements. Along with this week’s update. From AIT’s Kaohsiung office. Also reminded people. How to prepare a go-bag. With so many reminders from the U.S. That China is preparing for an invasion. And AIT posting warning after warning. And even changing their cover photo. To “Be Ready, Be Safe”. I think it’s no longer a subtle hint. It’s a clear call for everyone to be prepared. So I urge you to get up and get ready. Go buy your emergency supplies. Hopefully you’ll never need them. But buying them doesn’t hurt. Just eat them before they expire. And if disaster does happen. At least you’ll be prepared. And not left helpless or panicked. Taiwan has frequent earthquakes. And natural disasters aren’t uncommon here. So having supplies ready. Can help in many types of situations. The idea of a go-bag. Is to give you time and flexibility in a crisis. So your life isn’t severely disrupted. I personally recommend having at least 3 days of food. And a supply of clean drinking water. In your emergency kit. If you can prepare for over two weeks, even better. You might not end up needing it. But if you ever do. It could be life-saving. Again, no need to panic just yet. In fact, the more prepared you are. The more your anxiety will naturally decrease. Especially when you see more and more people joining in. It really shifts your mindset. A fully mobilized society. A Taiwan with strong resilience. Requires all of us to work together. And that will make any invader. Think twice before acting. Stay strong, everyone. Stay strong, Taiwan. That’s all for today’s video. If you liked it, please give it a thumbs up and subscribe. You're also welcome to join my YouTube channel membership.

And support this series. I'm Potter King. See you in the next video. Bye-bye.

=============

item.title: 不忍了！美國嗆聲、菲國開噴、法國點名！從香格里拉對話看印太局勢：小國學會反擊，中共防長不敢來｜香格里拉峰會精彩片段整理｜粉紅特報130期
item.itunes:title: 不忍了！美國嗆聲、菲國開噴、法國點名！從香格里拉對話看印太局勢：小國學會反擊，中共防長不敢來｜香格里拉峰會精彩片段整理｜粉紅特報130期
item.itunes:author: 波特王好帥
item.itunes:summary:
值得閱讀的理由

  • 深入了解年度香格里拉對話安全論壇的重要內容，包含各國對於印太區域安全局勢的看法與趨勢。
  • 掌握美國、菲律賓、法國等國如何直接點名並批評中國的區域行徑，以及他們在軍事和外交上的具體作為。
  • 理解在美中競爭日益激烈的背景下，各國在區域安全議題上的立場，以及小型國家如何展現更強硬的反擊態度。

摘要

波特王在本期「粉紅特報」中，帶領觀眾關注年度亞太安全峰會——香格里拉對話。他解釋說，這個由英國智庫主辦的防務論壇，匯聚了亞太及全球主要國家的國防部長，共同討論區域安全議題，與德國慕尼黑安全會議並列為全球兩大安全論壇，因此其重要性不言而喻。

波特王指出，作為造成亞洲不安定的主要因素，中國自然成為本次峰會被針對的對象。有趣的是，中共也知道自己現在聲名狼藉，來參加峰會無疑會被各國輪番指責，如同接受審判，因此今年是中共首次沒有派國防部長出席，而是改由國防大學副校長顧鋼峰代打。他認為，這是歷年來中國參與香格里拉對話的代表官階最低的一次，讓人感覺沒有誠意溝通。

美國的強硬立場

美國國防部長奧斯汀（Lloyd Austin）在演說中，語帶雙關地批評中共沒有出席會議，表示「我們（美國）會一直在這裡，但有些人卻不在」。他多次點名中國，並稱其為「共產中國」，指控中共長期透過資訊戰攻擊美國及其他國家的基礎設施並竊取機密，且不斷對南海及周邊國家（包括台灣）進行軍事騷擾。奧斯汀呼籲全亞洲各國聯合起來對抗中國。

奧斯汀進一步警告，中共正積極準備可能動用軍事力量改變印太地區的權力平衡，並提到習近平已公開下令解放軍要在2027年前具備入侵台灣的能力。他強調，解放軍正在為真正的行動做準備。奧斯汀呼籲各國提升國防預算做好準備，並表示如果「共產中國」試圖用武力侵略台灣，後果將非常嚴重，因為美國不會坐視不管。美方的這項承諾非常明確且強硬，並非空話。奧斯汀現場宣布，美國將部署反艦飛彈系統到菲律賓，與菲律賓協防，並將升級駐日美軍總部，加強聯合作戰能力。今年夏天，美國也將在澳洲首次進行中程飛彈試射。美國希望盟友成為有能力的合作夥伴，而不是依賴者。波特王認為，美國這番話等於是願意帶領亞洲國家盟友團結，一起抵擋中共威脅，是向整個印太地區（包括台灣）的積極喊話。

菲律賓的直接回擊

除了美國，波特王特別強調菲律賓國防部長特奧多羅（Gilbert Teodoro）在峰會中的強硬表現。特奧多羅在演說中怒嗆中國強佔爭議海域並壓迫人民。當中共國防大學代表團成員提問，為何馬來西亞和越南能處理好與中國的分歧，菲律賓卻不行時，特奧多羅毫不客氣地當場洗臉中共官員。他諷刺地說，感謝他們將「政治宣傳偽裝成提問」，此話一出，現場還傳出掌聲。接著，他對中國在南海的行為提出強烈批評，當著眾多國家面前直言中國現在不可信。

特奧多羅進一步闡釋，雖然菲律賓與馬來西亞、越南同屬東協成員國，但他們都是主權獨立的國家，各有自己的領土完整和主權。他相信如果中國對菲律賓的行為發生在其他東協國家身上，會看到不同的反應。他強調，菲律賓不會獨自面對挑戰，並指出世界上沒有任何國家支持中國的九段線主張，超過50個國家譴責了中國在南海的行為，而沒有國家譴責菲律賓站出來維護其領土完整和主權。他總結說，有效的對話需要信任，而中國需要做很多重建信任的工作。他認為缺乏信任是與中國進行爭議解決或對話的最大障礙。

新加坡的觀察

主辦國新加坡的國防部長黃永宏（Ng Eng Hen）會後表示，他很期待美國接下來要做的事情，並認為現場所有參與國都對美國願意做出如此清楚的承諾感到振奮。他指出，對話平台讓各國能交換意見、減少誤判，雖然不一定能在所有議題上達成共識，但擁有這樣一個平台來進行交流，對於理解彼此的意圖非常重要。

法國的警告

法國總統馬克宏也出席了峰會並在演說中示警。波特王轉述，馬克宏表示如果國際社會允許俄羅斯在不受任何限制或全球秩序反對的情況下奪取烏克蘭領土，那麼台灣會發生什麼事？他也反對中國改變台海現狀。結果中國聽到後氣急敗壞，說法國不應將烏克蘭與台灣相比，並堅稱台灣問題是中國內政。法國外交部隨後重申對此議題的看法不變，波特王解讀這是「沒要管你中共氣什麼」。

峰會的整體氛圍與作者的評論

波特王認為，這場峰會可以說是「天下圍中」。雖然有些國家選擇觀望，例如馬來西亞首相安華（Anwar Ibrahim）的演說傾向於同時拉攏美中兩邊、不願選邊站，長期奉行積極不結盟原則，試圖左右逢源。波特王對安華這種想法持保留態度，尤其在當前局勢下，他認為這樣做可能兩邊都不討好。他指出，馬來西亞與中國在南海也有主權爭議，安華卻選擇觀望，並質疑其政治立場（提及安華支持哈馬斯與馬來西亞政治的種族化）。

波特王總結說，隨著美中競爭進入戰略清晰加集結對抗的階段，本次峰會明確地將中國定調為最主要的戰略挑戰，希望能建立一個圍堵中國的聯合體系。這種清晰的發言，不走戰略模糊路線，代表過去那種可以兩邊討好、兩邊都交朋友的灰色空間已經不存在了。在這種情況下還想保持觀望想法的國家，最終可能被兩邊都視為不可靠。他認為這次對話雖未簽署重大協議，但從各國講話的方式、誰站在哪邊、誰缺席或迴避等細節，都透露了各國未來選擇的方向，是下一輪對抗的前奏。簡單來說，就是「還沒開打，但劍已出鞘」，站錯位置的將會為自己的選擇負責。

影片後半段，波特王針對一些質疑美國是否會協防台灣的觀眾留言進行回應。他批評這些留言反映了資訊來源的偏差或認知失調，並強調台灣位處第一島鏈的關鍵位置，攸關美國本土安全，台灣的安全與美國的利益一致。他引用美方多位官員在不同場合（包括本次香格里拉對話）的明確表態，證明美國對台灣的支持以及反對中共破壞台海和平穩定的立場並非空話。他認為，如果看不見或不相信這些明確的事實，反而相信一些所謂的「謠言」，那問題不在於事實本身，而在於個人。他表示，對於一些無知且堅持錯誤觀點的人，他已經「釋懷了」，認為有些人就是永遠學不會或注定要被騙，應將時間和精力留給那些正在思考、準備醒來的人。他最後引用一句話來回應這些評論：「愚人的問題，智者無法回答。」

=============

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=wQMoBInrONs

點連結成為我的Youtube頻道會員：https://goo.gl/MFNUKr

對中共行徑不忍了！美國嗆聲、菲律賓開噴、法國點名！

從香格里拉對話看印太局勢：小國學會反擊，中共防長不敢來

香格里拉峰會精彩片段整理

粉紅特報130期

追蹤我IG：

https://www.instagram.com/potterking712/

追蹤我Threads：

https://www.threads.net/@potterking712

追蹤我臉書粉專：

https://www.facebook.com/Realpotterking
item.description:
值得閱讀的理由

  • 深入了解年度香格里拉對話安全論壇的重要內容，包含各國對於印太區域安全局勢的看法與趨勢。
  • 掌握美國、菲律賓、法國等國如何直接點名並批評中國的區域行徑，以及他們在軍事和外交上的具體作為。
  • 理解在美中競爭日益激烈的背景下，各國在區域安全議題上的立場，以及小型國家如何展現更強硬的反擊態度。

摘要

波特王在本期「粉紅特報」中，帶領觀眾關注年度亞太安全峰會——香格里拉對話。他解釋說，這個由英國智庫主辦的防務論壇，匯聚了亞太及全球主要國家的國防部長，共同討論區域安全議題，與德國慕尼黑安全會議並列為全球兩大安全論壇，因此其重要性不言而喻。

波特王指出，作為造成亞洲不安定的主要因素，中國自然成為本次峰會被針對的對象。有趣的是，中共也知道自己現在聲名狼藉，來參加峰會無疑會被各國輪番指責，如同接受審判，因此今年是中共首次沒有派國防部長出席，而是改由國防大學副校長顧鋼峰代打。他認為，這是歷年來中國參與香格里拉對話的代表官階最低的一次，讓人感覺沒有誠意溝通。

美國的強硬立場

美國國防部長奧斯汀（Lloyd Austin）在演說中，語帶雙關地批評中共沒有出席會議，表示「我們（美國）會一直在這裡，但有些人卻不在」。他多次點名中國，並稱其為「共產中國」，指控中共長期透過資訊戰攻擊美國及其他國家的基礎設施並竊取機密，且不斷對南海及周邊國家（包括台灣）進行軍事騷擾。奧斯汀呼籲全亞洲各國聯合起來對抗中國。

奧斯汀進一步警告，中共正積極準備可能動用軍事力量改變印太地區的權力平衡，並提到習近平已公開下令解放軍要在2027年前具備入侵台灣的能力。他強調，解放軍正在為真正的行動做準備。奧斯汀呼籲各國提升國防預算做好準備，並表示如果「共產中國」試圖用武力侵略台灣，後果將非常嚴重，因為美國不會坐視不管。美方的這項承諾非常明確且強硬，並非空話。奧斯汀現場宣布，美國將部署反艦飛彈系統到菲律賓，與菲律賓協防，並將升級駐日美軍總部，加強聯合作戰能力。今年夏天，美國也將在澳洲首次進行中程飛彈試射。美國希望盟友成為有能力的合作夥伴，而不是依賴者。波特王認為，美國這番話等於是願意帶領亞洲國家盟友團結，一起抵擋中共威脅，是向整個印太地區（包括台灣）的積極喊話。

菲律賓的直接回擊

除了美國，波特王特別強調菲律賓國防部長特奧多羅（Gilbert Teodoro）在峰會中的強硬表現。特奧多羅在演說中怒嗆中國強佔爭議海域並壓迫人民。當中共國防大學代表團成員提問，為何馬來西亞和越南能處理好與中國的分歧，菲律賓卻不行時，特奧多羅毫不客氣地當場洗臉中共官員。他諷刺地說，感謝他們將「政治宣傳偽裝成提問」，此話一出，現場還傳出掌聲。接著，他對中國在南海的行為提出強烈批評，當著眾多國家面前直言中國現在不可信。

特奧多羅進一步闡釋，雖然菲律賓與馬來西亞、越南同屬東協成員國，但他們都是主權獨立的國家，各有自己的領土完整和主權。他相信如果中國對菲律賓的行為發生在其他東協國家身上，會看到不同的反應。他強調，菲律賓不會獨自面對挑戰，並指出世界上沒有任何國家支持中國的九段線主張，超過50個國家譴責了中國在南海的行為，而沒有國家譴責菲律賓站出來維護其領土完整和主權。他總結說，有效的對話需要信任，而中國需要做很多重建信任的工作。他認為缺乏信任是與中國進行爭議解決或對話的最大障礙。

新加坡的觀察

主辦國新加坡的國防部長黃永宏（Ng Eng Hen）會後表示，他很期待美國接下來要做的事情，並認為現場所有參與國都對美國願意做出如此清楚的承諾感到振奮。他指出，對話平台讓各國能交換意見、減少誤判，雖然不一定能在所有議題上達成共識，但擁有這樣一個平台來進行交流，對於理解彼此的意圖非常重要。

法國的警告

法國總統馬克宏也出席了峰會並在演說中示警。波特王轉述，馬克宏表示如果國際社會允許俄羅斯在不受任何限制或全球秩序反對的情況下奪取烏克蘭領土，那麼台灣會發生什麼事？他也反對中國改變台海現狀。結果中國聽到後氣急敗壞，說法國不應將烏克蘭與台灣相比，並堅稱台灣問題是中國內政。法國外交部隨後重申對此議題的看法不變，波特王解讀這是「沒要管你中共氣什麼」。

峰會的整體氛圍與作者的評論

波特王認為，這場峰會可以說是「天下圍中」。雖然有些國家選擇觀望，例如馬來西亞首相安華（Anwar Ibrahim）的演說傾向於同時拉攏美中兩邊、不願選邊站，長期奉行積極不結盟原則，試圖左右逢源。波特王對安華這種想法持保留態度，尤其在當前局勢下，他認為這樣做可能兩邊都不討好。他指出，馬來西亞與中國在南海也有主權爭議，安華卻選擇觀望，並質疑其政治立場（提及安華支持哈馬斯與馬來西亞政治的種族化）。

波特王總結說，隨著美中競爭進入戰略清晰加集結對抗的階段，本次峰會明確地將中國定調為最主要的戰略挑戰，希望能建立一個圍堵中國的聯合體系。這種清晰的發言，不走戰略模糊路線，代表過去那種可以兩邊討好、兩邊都交朋友的灰色空間已經不存在了。在這種情況下還想保持觀望想法的國家，最終可能被兩邊都視為不可靠。他認為這次對話雖未簽署重大協議，但從各國講話的方式、誰站在哪邊、誰缺席或迴避等細節，都透露了各國未來選擇的方向，是下一輪對抗的前奏。簡單來說，就是「還沒開打，但劍已出鞘」，站錯位置的將會為自己的選擇負責。

影片後半段，波特王針對一些質疑美國是否會協防台灣的觀眾留言進行回應。他批評這些留言反映了資訊來源的偏差或認知失調，並強調台灣位處第一島鏈的關鍵位置，攸關美國本土安全，台灣的安全與美國的利益一致。他引用美方多位官員在不同場合（包括本次香格里拉對話）的明確表態，證明美國對台灣的支持以及反對中共破壞台海和平穩定的立場並非空話。他認為，如果看不見或不相信這些明確的事實，反而相信一些所謂的「謠言」，那問題不在於事實本身，而在於個人。他表示，對於一些無知且堅持錯誤觀點的人，他已經「釋懷了」，認為有些人就是永遠學不會或注定要被騙，應將時間和精力留給那些正在思考、準備醒來的人。他最後引用一句話來回應這些評論：「愚人的問題，智者無法回答。」

=============

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=wQMoBInrONs

  • 掌握美國、菲律賓、法國等國如何直接點名並批評中國的區域行徑，以及他們在軍事和外交上的具體作為。

主辦國新加坡的國防部長黃永宏（Ng Eng Hen）會後表示，他很期待美國接下來要做的事情，並認為現場所有參與國都對美國願意做出如此清楚的承諾感到振奮。他指出，對話平台讓各國能交換意見、減少誤判，雖然不一定能在所有議題上達成共識，但擁有這樣一個平台來進行交流，對於理解彼此的意圖非常重要。

法國的警告

法國總統馬克宏也出席了峰會並在演說中示警。波特王轉述，馬克宏表示如果國際社會允許俄羅斯在不受任何限制或全球秩序反對的情況下奪取烏克蘭領土，那麼台灣會發生什麼事？他也反對中國改變台海現狀。結果中國聽到後氣急敗壞，說法國不應將烏克蘭與台灣相比，並堅稱台灣問題是中國內政。法國外交部隨後重申對此議題的看法不變，波特王解讀這是「沒要管你中共氣什麼」。

峰會的整體氛圍與作者的評論

波特王認為，這場峰會可以說是「天下圍中」。雖然有些國家選擇觀望，例如馬來西亞首相安華（Anwar Ibrahim）的演說傾向於同時拉攏美中兩邊、不願選邊站，長期奉行積極不結盟原則，試圖左右逢源。波特王對安華這種想法持保留態度，尤其在當前局勢下，他認為這樣做可能兩邊都不討好。他指出，馬來西亞與中國在南海也有主權爭議，安華卻選擇觀望，並質疑其政治立場（提及安華支持哈馬斯與馬來西亞政治的種族化）。

波特王總結說，隨著美中競爭進入戰略清晰加集結對抗的階段，本次峰會明確地將中國定調為最主要的戰略挑戰，希望能建立一個圍堵中國的聯合體系。這種清晰的發言，不走戰略模糊路線，代表過去那種可以兩邊討好、兩邊都交朋友的灰色空間已經不存在了。在這種情況下還想保持觀望想法的國家，最終可能被兩邊都視為不可靠。他認為這次對話雖未簽署重大協議，但從各國講話的方式、誰站在哪邊、誰缺席或迴避等細節，都透露了各國未來選擇的方向，是下一輪對抗的前奏。簡單來說，就是「還沒開打，但劍已出鞘」，站錯位置的將會為自己的選擇負責。

影片後半段，波特王針對一些質疑美國是否會協防台灣的觀眾留言進行回應。他批評這些留言反映了資訊來源的偏差或認知失調，並強調台灣位處第一島鏈的關鍵位置，攸關美國本土安全，台灣的安全與美國的利益一致。他引用美方多位官員在不同場合（包括本次香格里拉對話）的明確表態，證明美國對台灣的支持以及反對中共破壞台海和平穩定的立場並非空話。他認為，如果看不見或不相信這些明確的事實，反而相信一些所謂的「謠言」，那問題不在於事實本身，而在於個人。他表示，對於一些無知且堅持錯誤觀點的人，他已經「釋懷了」，認為有些人就是永遠學不會或注定要被騙，應將時間和精力留給那些正在思考、準備醒來的人。他最後引用一句話來回應這些評論：「愚人的問題，智者無法回答。」

=============

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=wQMoBInrONs

點連結成為我的Youtube頻道會員：https://goo.gl/MFNUKr

對中共行徑不忍了！美國嗆聲、菲律賓開噴、法國點名！

從香格里拉對話看印太局勢：小國學會反擊，中共防長不敢來

item.title: 剖析中共踩一捧一心理戰！假帳帶風向製造台灣分化｜中共國台辦替館長背書！如何應對中配在台開直播拍攝學童？｜粉紅特報129期
item.itunes:title: 剖析中共踩一捧一心理戰！假帳帶風向製造台灣分化｜中共國台辦替館長背書！如何應對中配在台開直播拍攝學童？｜粉紅特報129期
item.itunes:author: 波特王好帥
item.itunes:summary:
值得閱讀的理由

  • 了解中共「以人治人」、「分而治之」策略的歷史淵源與現代應用。
  • 揭露中共網軍如何利用製造對立，分化台灣社會的具體手法，以及辨識惡意帳號的技巧。
  • 認識一位台灣反共YouTuber面對網路攻擊與分化時的堅定立場與應對策略。
  • 學習如何過濾網路噪音與有毒資訊，保護自己的數位空間。

摘要

策略解析與歷史案例

影片開頭，自稱為最佳抗共投資顧問的Potter老師點出了中共慣用的統治策略，即「以人治人」或稱「分而治之」。這種策略的本質是製造內部的爭鬥以達成外部控制。Potter老師舉例說明了該策略在歷史上的應用，包括文化大革命中煽動紅衛兵批鬥走資派、土地改革中鼓動農民批鬥地主，以及六四事件後以「愛國學生」對抗「維穩力量」來轉移矛盾，這些都導致了社會的分裂與對立。

現代應用與網路分化

Potter老師指出，這種分化策略至今仍在延續。在中共的視角中，只要支持台灣主權、不承認中共政權合法性的人，不論主張台獨或認同中華民國，一律會被貼上「分裂分子」的標籤。他強調，「台獨」並非法律概念，而是中共用於污名化與妖魔化的政治工具。中共的目標不在說服，而在於摧毀團結。

網路分化實例：針對Potter與八炯

隨著網路的普及與網軍產業的興盛，中共開始利用網路水軍和「小粉紅」，偽裝成不同聲音，刻意煽動對立，製造內訌，轉移公眾對中共這個真正壓迫者的注意力。Potter老師觀察到這種分化手段近期被用於他和另一位創作者「八炯」身上。他分享了自己頻道收到的留言，如「不如八炯掰掰」或指責他與八炯的差異在於對方認真做內容，而他則靠剪輯抹黑等。

水軍辨識與情報交換

Potter老師進一步分析這些惡意留言帳號的特徵，發現許多使用相同語句，甚至有帳號的貼文是印度語，顯示可能是一次性使用的水軍帳號，可能也在印度執行其他操作。他表示，一旦發現這種分化策略，立刻與八炯溝通。八炯檢查後台數據後證實，這些帳號從未觀看過他的影片或留言，顯然是專門來鬧事的水軍。

警惕與堅定立場

藉由這次親身經歷的分化事件，Potter老師提醒觀眾務必提高警覺，辨識試圖分化台灣人的中共網軍。他預期隨著罷免運動的升溫，中共的攻擊和不實訊息將會更加頻繁，呼籲大家不要上當受騙。Potter老師重申自己的立場不會動搖，即使被自己人誤解，也絕不會放棄反共。他強調自己的一切作為始終是反共挺台，直到生命終點都要以台灣人身份死去，即使無法再製作影片，也會轉而支持其他反共台灣創作者。

反共社群生態與挑戰

Potter老師表達對其他反共台灣創作者毫無嫉妒，真心樂見他們發展，因為他們表達了自己內心的想法，替他說話。他指出，實際製作影片揭露中共的台灣知名反共創作者屈指可數，點名了八炯、閩南郎、曹長青等人，加上自己也僅有四位，數量遠少於親共頻道與水軍帳號。他歡迎更多人加入反共的行列，一起對抗中共，但強調是真正的盟友，而非偽裝挺台騙流量的中國「小粉紅」網紅。

回應攻擊與面對騷擾

Potter老師特別點名像「小粉紅」陳玉珍這樣已經與中共妥協、不斷攻擊他的人，以及一堆藍白粉網紅。他對於這些人不斷重複已澄清兩年的謊言，或編造新的攻擊內容感到無奈，認為他們不重要且無法溝通，直言對方可悲。他批評台灣身處自由世界，卻活成小粉紅的樣子，質疑對方的智商與邏輯。針對藍白粉網紅常提到的攻擊，例如他偷竊頻道或曲解判決，Potter老師駁斥這些說法，強調自己贏了官司，質疑對方缺乏法律常識，呼籲依循邏輯、科學、理性思考，不明白就去請教律師，而非輕信舔共網紅。他表示自己患有「低智商過敏症」，選擇封鎖這些惡意帳號，但也無奈他們不斷創建新帳號繼續騷擾。

辨識投降主義與過濾人際

Potter老師觀察到Threads等平台上也充斥著「投降主義」的敘事，例如聲稱寧願被中國統一失去自由也不願打仗。他反問抱持這種想法的人為何不直接變更國籍去中國居住。最後，他建議觀眾看到這些虛假或有害帳號時，應立即封鎖，將其視為過濾人際關係的方式，避免現實中接觸價值觀不合的人，保持耳根清淨與身心健康。

影片最後，Potter老師表示這是本月特別報告的最後一個更新，分享了近期的經歷，並預告接下來將分享關於國台辦點名YouTuber GYM 的片段。

================================================

Hello everyone, welcome back to. this week's Pink Report. I'm your best anti-CCP investment advisor,. Teacher Potter. Since the founding of the CCP,. they’ve often relied on a ruling tactic. called "people against people," also known as "divide and rule." A strategy of internal strife for external control. Historical examples include. the Cultural Revolution,. when Chairman Mao mobilized the "Red Guards" to denounce so-called "capitalist roaders" and "counterrevolutionaries," which led to ordinary people. snitching, denouncing, and fighting each other,. tearing apart families and betraying friends,. with the whole nation plunged. into a frenzy of self-destruction. Another example is land reform,. where peasants were incited to expose and struggle against landlords. And after the Tiananmen massacre,. the regime used a narrative of "patriotic students vs. stability forces" to create societal division. and deflect public anger away from the CCP itself. And this method of manipulation. continues to this day. In the CCP’s worldview,. as long as you support Taiwan's sovereignty. and reject the legitimacy of CCP rule,. whether you're for Taiwan independence. or support the Republic of China,. you’ll be labeled a "separatist." In CCP rhetoric, "Taiwan independence" is not a legal classification,. but a political smear meant for demonization. The CCP’s goal isn’t to convince you—. but to make you turn on each other,. to destroy solidarity. With the rise of the internet. and booming troll industries,. the CCP now deploys online trolls and "Little Pinks" to pose as different voices online,. intentionally stirring division. and getting people to fight each other,. distracting them from the real oppressor—the CCP. Sometimes they play both sides—. praising one while attacking another—. and through this method,. within a group,. they prop up one faction and suppress the other,. eventually controlling the whole. Recently, I noticed this exact tactic—. the CCP's divide-and-conquer trick—. being used against me and Bajiong. Of course, it doesn't work on us,. but I figured it’s worth sharing as a case study. I started noticing. some troll and Little Pink accounts. trying to stir up division between me and Bajiong.

Like this comment on my channel:. “Not as good as Bajiong, bye!”. Or this one—different accounts,. but they all post the exact same thing. Let me show you:. “I think another channel said it well the other day—. your difference is:. Bajiong works hard on content,. you work hard on editing,. cherry-picking,. cutting and smearing with fake edits. That’s really low.”. “Even if Bajiong’s videos are sometimes content-light,. at least he doesn’t use manipulative editing to smear others.”. These even come from people who were originally on our side—. pretending to support while backhanding me,. all just to “give advice.”. They even buy likes,. liking their own comments. to create the illusion of widespread support,. so the algorithm boosts their comments,. and more people see it. This other comment said the same thing:. “I think another channel said it well the other day—. your difference is…”. brbrbrbrbrbr. See? Click into these accounts,. some even post in Hindi. Clearly disposable troll accounts. Probably running other operations in India too. Because Hindi. is one of India’s official languages. Previously, there were reports. of the CCP paying Indian influencers for propaganda,. to cooperate in disinformation campaigns. and shape a pro-China online environment. After spotting this CCP tactic to divide Taiwanese,. I immediately told Bajiong. After all, there aren’t many anti-CCP creators in Taiwan,. so we really need to stick together. We exchanged info to keep each other alert. Bajiong told me. he checked his backend analytics on those accounts. Turns out these people. never even watched his videos,. and never left comments before. They’re clearly just trolls causing trouble,. and not even doing a good job at it. But through this divisive tactic we encountered,. I want to remind everyone. that this strategy really exists. Please stay alert to the CCP's online trolls. trying to divide Taiwanese people. As the mass recall movement picks up,. the CCP’s attacks and disinformation campaigns. will definitely become more frequent. Don’t fall for it. I actually took precautions beforehand,.

and already posted a statement. Some of you may have missed it,. so let me share my thoughts again. I promise all of you,. I won’t abandon my anti-CCP stance. just because I’m misunderstood by my own people. Because I know who I am,. and where I stand. My stance has never changed. Everything I’ve done has always been anti-CCP, pro-Taiwan. That won’t change. Even on the day I die,. I want to die as a Taiwanese. And if one day I can no longer make videos,. I’ll switch to. supporting other anti-CCP Taiwanese creators. It’s that simple. So these divide-and-conquer tactics. don’t work on me. But I still want to remind everyone—. don’t be misled by them. I personally feel zero jealousy. toward other anti-CCP creators in Taiwan. I’m genuinely happy to see them thrive. Because in some way,. they’re expressing exactly what I feel. They’re speaking on my behalf. If someone can say what’s in your heart—. and curse out Little Pinks for you—. that feels amazing! Even though I’m a YouTuber,. I’m also a viewer, just like all of you. And let’s be honest—. Taiwanese anti-CCP creators. who actually make videos exposing the CCP—. think about it—how many well-known ones are there? Just think—. who comes to mind? And I’m not talking about lawmakers or politicians—. I mean independent media creators. Think about it—. not many, right? The ones I can name—. Taiwanese anti-CCP creators making videos—. Bajiong,. Min Nan Lang,. Chairman Cao—. just a handful. Add me, and it’s only four of us. Way too few. Which makes the pro-CCP channels way louder by comparison. Not to mention tons of troll accounts. I always say—. everyone’s welcome to join the anti-CCP movement. Come fight the CCP with us. And I’m not joking. I truly want more people to join. I want more pro-Taiwan allies against the CCP. The more, the better.

But real allies, okay? Not the type that fake being pro-Taiwan to gain followers—. then turn out to be. Little Pink influencers from China. I don’t even need to name them—. you all know who I mean. Yeah, it’s Little Pink Chen Yu-zhen. He’s already compromised with the CCP,. and now constantly attacks me. His entire channel revolves around me now—. either bashing me,. or bashing the DPP and the Bluebirds. And now a bunch of KMT-Ko Wen-je influencer hybrids are jumping in too,. asking why I haven’t responded to his photoshopped posts. Honestly, I’m speechless. There are so many idiots out there. And many of the things they attack me for—. I literally already addressed two years ago. The video is still up. The relevant post is still on my page. But the Blue-White trolls just keep repeating themselves,. or they make up new lies. One reason I don’t respond is because I’ve already said it. The other reason is:. you guys just aren’t that important. There’s just no way to communicate with you. Honestly, I think you’re pathetic. People in China. act like Little Pinks because of CCP control. But you’re out here in the free world,. and still managed to become a Little Pink? How did you even manage that? Are you just dumber, or what? There are still idiots saying I stole someone’s channel. I didn’t steal a channel—your brain got stolen. I won the lawsuit. Now you say I twisted the ruling? What, you think Taiwan’s judges are made of plastic? Stop being legally illiterate. What happened to logic, science, and rational thinking? If you don’t understand something,. go pay a lawyer for advice. Don’t just parrot. whatever some CCP-kowtowing influencer tells you. Talking about this is triggering my stupidity allergy. I don’t want to deal with idiots. I block them—. then they make new accounts to harass me again. And whine, "Why block me?" Like… what is wrong with you? Are you all masochists or something? Love watching, love trolling? Are you secretly in love with me? And you support pro-CCP, sellout parties. just so you can live. a life like people in China? Fine. I’m done talking to you. That’s why I blocked you. If you were in China,.

your whole account would be nuked. If you can’t even handle that,. why are you acting like a troll? You can’t handle censorship,. but you support pro-CCP parties? And honestly, I’m not even sure you’re real. With all the bot-driven narrative shaping going on,. on every platform—. even Threads, which lots of Taiwanese use now—. you’ll see accounts spreading appeasement narratives. Posts like:. "I’d rather be unified by China,. and give up all freedom of speech,. give up every democratic value,. than see myself or loved ones die in war. fighting a war we might not even win." If that’s how you think,. why not just change your nationality and go live in China? You want to live like livestock,. without the right to seek justice? Then go be a Chinese citizen. Seriously—. why are you still here in Taiwan? When you see these fake accounts online,. just block them immediately. You don’t even know. if there’s a real person behind them. In fact, if it *is* a real person,. that’s all the more reason to block them. That way you won’t accidentally run into them in real life—. like one day,. you meet them offline—. and they say "Follow my account!" But you can’t even find each other’s usernames. Right then, you’ll know:. this person’s values don’t align with yours. No need to waste time getting close to them. It’s like filtering your social circle. Avoid toxic friends. If they run a business—. you won’t be spending your money there either. Your ears stay clean, and you stay sane. Win-win all around. This video today. is the last update for this month’s special report. Just wanted to share. what I’ve experienced recently. Not sure if any of you. have come across similar troll flooding situations. Feel free to share below. Next, let me show you a clip. of the Taiwan Affairs Office. name-dropping YouTuber GYM GUANZ. Take a look. Last time,. they endorsed Zhong Ming-xuan. This time, it’s GYM GUANZ’s turn. The Taiwan Affairs Office. even vowed to hold Bajiong "accountable for life."

That’s insane. Of course, by showing this clip,. some trolls will come in and say,. "Oh, the Taiwan Affairs Office was just responding to a reporter’s question." Trying to downplay it. But I have to say—. if you're saying that,. you’re either a fool. or you clearly don’t understand. how those Taiwan Affairs Office press conferences work. Those press conferences are all staged by the CCP—. they decide who asks questions,. what to ask,. and even what the spokesperson should answer. Everything is scripted in advance. Just look at the Taiwan Affairs Office spokesperson—. they’re always reading from a script. In the past, GYM GUANZ. was actually anti-CCP and pro-Taiwan. But now he’s veered off and turned pro-CCP,. making comments that hurt Taiwanese people—. that’s a fact too. Now that the Taiwan Affairs Office is naming and praising him,. you really can’t say others are smearing him red. This is the CCP painting him red in person. Since I once bought GYM GUANZ’s merch,. supported him during his anti-CCP days—. I’ll give him one piece of advice:. There’s only one way out for you now. Go smack Chairman Xi’s wife on the butt. After all, you’re the one who said it back then. If GYM GUANZ really goes to China to livestream,. and actually smacks Xi’s wife’s butt—. then shouts loudly,. "We Taiwanese will smack whoever we want!" If it really turns out like that,. even though smacking someone’s wife is wrong,. if he dares to do that—. I’ll respect him. I’d immediately join his gym,. and buy a 5-year membership. In the past, Jing Ke tried to assassinate the Qin emperor—. now we have GYM GUANZ smacking Winnie the Pooh’s wife. GYM GUANZ, if you want redemption,. if you want a shot at a new beginning—. this is your only chance. By the way, I checked comments from inside China. about GYM GUANZ visiting the mainland. Most of them. are still looking down on him. They see him as a flip-flopper chasing clout—. possibly the next Zhong Ming-xuan. Just trying to change public opinion direction. Come visit the mainland,. and give himself an excuse to bow out. Starting to wave the red flag. That’s what smart people do. Flip-flopper. Used to be green, now he’s blue.

All the stuff he said online—. it’s all recorded. Ever since GYM GUANZ got shot—. and survived—he’s changed. Back in the day,. he even argued with me on Facebook. I said if he showed up, I’d punch him. Now maybe it’s time for me to get ready. So this is how he whitewashes himself. And beyond GYM GUANZ being endorsed—. recently, a bunch of Chinese spouses in Taiwan have been live-streaming on TikTok,. filming kids going to and from school. This might violate child protection laws,. and even break privacy laws. At first, we didn’t know whether these Chinese spouses. were helping the CCP. carry out some shady mission. If you search for "Taiwanese elementary school students" on TikTok,. you’ll find tons of similar livestream clips. As more and more Taiwanese parents get concerned—. and DPP councilors report the issue—. police have started cracking down. At first we weren’t sure of their true intent. Some online trolls tried to downplay it—. “It’s just livestreaming, what’s the big deal?”. Then boom—. the Taiwan Affairs Office shows up again with support. They say Taiwan’s government is persecuting Chinese spouses. If the CCP supports something—. you can be sure it’s in their interest. So why are all these Chinese spouses. suddenly livestreaming Taiwanese students? Now it’s looking less and less innocent. The chance they’re on a mission is very high. PRC law already requires. all organizations and citizens. to cooperate with Chinese intelligence. So if the Taiwan Affairs Office is throwing a tantrum now—. it means the Taiwan police are doing something right. Whenever the Taiwan Affairs Office defends someone or something,. that’s exactly when we should investigate harder. So if you see Chinese people. livestreaming students on the street—. stand next to them and shout:. "Thank you for supporting justice for the Tiananmen massacre!" "Thank you for supporting the downfall of the CCP!" "Thanks for donating to the anti-CCP fund!" "Down with Xi Jinping!" Or something like that. That’ll probably get their livestream cut off. Let’s work together to protect Taiwan’s elementary school kids. What do you think about today’s topic? Feel free to share your thoughts in the comments below. That’s it for today’s video. I’m Potter King. If you liked this video, please like and subscribe. And feel free to join my YouTube membership. to support this series. See you in the next video.

Bye-bye.

=============

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=U2Zcy8IawP4
